fields.description: Note: Only one feature can be enabled at a time. Both features calculate tax on profit margin but use different methods.
fields.label: Profit Margin Tax Features (Enable Only One)
Enable Profit Margin Tax (Charge Type Method)
Enable Auto-Add Profit Margin Item (Item Method)
Help Text
fields.options:
Important: Only One Feature at a Time

You can only enable ONE feature at a time. Both features calculate tax on profit margin but use different methods. Choose the one that best fits your workflow.

Feature 1: Profit Margin Tax (Charge Type Method)

When enabled, you can use "On Profit Margin" charge type in Sales Taxes and Charges table.

This calculates tax based on profit margin: Tax = (Rate / 100) × (Selling Price - Purchase Price)

Supported in: Sales Invoice, Sales Order, Quotation

Feature 2: Auto-Add Profit Margin Item (Item Method)

When enabled, automatically adds a "Profit Margin" item to the items table when Vehicle items with serial numbers are added.

The profit margin is calculated and set as the Rate of the "Profit Margin" item, allowing normal tax calculation on the profit amount.

Supported in: Sales Invoice, Sales Order
